caption:
🇳🇬 on today's episode of Nigeria My Country

At a time when security challenges remain a major concern, a reported ₦1 billion allocation for cemetery projects in Zamfara has sparked intense public debate.

Many Nigerians are asking: 
👉🏽 Should budget priorities reflect immediate security needs?
👉🏽 How should states balance infrastructure, healthcare, education, and safety?
👉🏽 What truly defines responsible governance?
Public accountability begins with informed conversations.
What’s your take?

#NigeriaMyCountry #PublicPolicy #BudgetPriorities #Governance #SecurityMatters CivicEngagement Nigeria2026 PublicDebate

caption:
⚖️ Policy Update You Shouldn’t Ignore

The Electricity Act (Amendment) 2025 is now law - signed on February 2, 2026.

What this means: 
• States yet to establish independent regulatory authorities are now clearly addressed
• New obligations on operating expenses for infrastructure & environmental projects
• Direct impact on host communities, investors, and power sector stakeholders

This amendment isn’t just paperwork, it reshapes accountability in Nigeria’s electricity sector.

📌 Stay informed. Stay compliant.
📩 For guidance or legal insight, reach out.

#ElectricityAct #LegalUpdate #EnergyLaw #PolicyUpdate

caption:
⚖️ LEGAL MYTH vs FACT

❌ “A landlord can evict you immediately for not paying rent.”

Many tenants panic when this happens.
Many landlords also don’t know the correct legal process.

The truth?
Eviction must follow due process under the law.
No one should take the law into their hands.
Are you a landlord or a tenant? 

#LegalMyth #TenantRights #LandlordLaw #NigerianLaw #KnowTheLaw OAKolawoleAndCo

caption:
ON TODAY’S EPISODE OF MY COUNTRY NIGERIA 🇳🇬⚖️

Impersonating a lawyer is not just unethical, it’s a criminal offence.

A man identified as U.T. Oghenetijiri was arrested at the Orhuwhorun Magistrates’ Court, Delta State, for allegedly posing as a legal practitioner.
This case is a reminder that the legal profession is protected by law, and pretending to be a lawyer carries serious consequences.

👉 Swipe to learn: 
• Why impersonation is a crime
• How to verify a legal practitioner
• What the law says about this offence

⚖️ Stay informed. Stay protected.

#MyCountryNigeria #LegalAwareness #KnowTheLaw #NigeriaLaw  #LegalEducation

caption:
MYTH OR FACT!

Many people believe that an agreement must be written to be valid.
A written contract protects your rights, your money and your peace of mind.
Always put it in writing.
Before you sign or agree to anything, speak to a lawyer.

#mythvsfact #oakolawoleandco #myths #facts #monday

caption:
⚖️ DID YOU KNOW?

Under Section 33 of the Criminal Code Act, a wife in a Christian marriage may be exempt from criminal liability if she was compelled by her husband  but only under specific conditions.

However, this protection is not absolute.

If the offence involves serious crimes such as those punishable by death or causing grievous harm, coercion may not excuse liability.

The law is detailed.
Context matters.
Facts matter.

That is why legal guidance is important before drawing conclusions.

💬 Were you aware of this provision?

#KnowTheLaw #LegalAwareness #CriminalLaw #NigerianLaw #OAKolawoleAndCo
